name: python3-jsonschema
title: python3-jsonschema
description:
An(other) implementation of JSON Schema
JSON Schema is a specification for a JSON-based format for defining the
structure of JSON data. JSON Schema provides a contract for what JSON data is
required for a given application and how it can be modified, much like what
XML Schema provides for XML. JSON Schema is intended to provide validation,
documentation, and interaction control of JSON data.
.
This package has full support for Draft 2020-12, Draft 2019-09, Draft 7,
Draft 6, Draft 4 and Draft 3.
